languages.text: {n}Безумец стреляет не задумываясь, но вы оказываетесь быстрее. Прожигая все на своем пути, смертельный плевок плазмы уходит в сторону.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Безумец стреляет не задумываясь, но вы оказываетесь быстрее. Прожигая все на своем пути, смертельный плевок плазмы уходит в сторону.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The madman fires without a second thought, but you are faster. The deadly plasma blast is deflected, incinerating everything in its path.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Безумец стреляет не задумываясь, но вы оказываетесь быстрее. Прожигая все на своем пути, смертельный плевок плазмы уходит в сторону.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The madman fires without a second thought, but you are faster. The deadly plasma blast veers off to the side, incinerating everything in its path.{/n}
{n}The madman fires without a second thought, but you are faster. The deadly plasma blast veers off to the side, incinerating everything in its path.{/n}
{n}The madman fires without a second thought, but you are faster. The deadly plasma blast is deflected, incinerating everything in its path.{/n}
{n}The madman fires without a second thought, but you are faster. The deadly plasma blast is deflected, incinerating everything in its path.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Verrückte feuert, ohne nachzudenken, aber du bist schneller. Das tödliche Plasma wird abgelenkt und setzt alles auf seinem Weg in Brand.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The madman fires without a second thought, but you are faster. The deadly plasma blast is deflected, incinerating everything in its path.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Verrückte feuert, ohne nachzudenken, aber du bist schneller. Das tödliche Plasma wird abgelenkt und setzt alles auf seinem Weg in Brand.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le fou tire sans hésiter, mais vous êtes plus rapide et déviez sans mal le plasma mortel, qui réduit en cendres tout ce qui se trouve sur son passage.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The madman fires without a second thought, but you are faster. The deadly plasma blast is deflected, incinerating everything in its path.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le fou tire sans hésiter, mais vous êtes plus rapide et déviez sans mal le plasma mortel, qui réduit en cendres tout ce qui se trouve sur son passage.{/n}

languages.text: {n}那疯子毫不犹豫地开火，可你动作更快。致命的等离子束被弹开，将沿途的一切都化为灰烬。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The madman fires without a second thought, but you are faster. The deadly plasma blast is deflected, incinerating everything in its path.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}那疯子毫不犹豫地开火，可你动作更快。致命的等离子束被弹开，将沿途的一切都化为灰烬。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El lunático dispara sin titubear, pero te adelantas a sus acciones. El letal proyectil de plasma queda desviado, aunque lo incinera todo a su paso.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The madman fires without a second thought, but you are faster. The deadly plasma blast is deflected, incinerating everything in its path.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El lunático dispara sin titubear, pero te adelantas a sus acciones. El letal proyectil de plasma queda desviado, aunque lo incinera todo a su paso.{/n}

languages.text: {n}狂人は迷うことなく発砲したが、あなたの方が速い。致命的なプラズマの爆風は横へ逸れ、その進路にあるものすべてを焼き尽くす。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The madman fires without a second thought, but you are faster. The deadly plasma blast veers off to the side, incinerating everything in its path.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deli adam hiç düşünmeden ateş ediyor fakat sen daha hızlı davranıyorsun. Ölümcül plazma patlaması, yön değiştirerek yoluna çıkan her şeyi yakıp kül ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The madman fires without a second thought, but you are faster. The deadly plasma blast is deflected, incinerating everything in its path.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Deli adam hiç düşünmeden ateş ediyor fakat sen daha hızlı davranıyorsun. Ölümcül plazma patlaması, yön değiştirerek yoluna çıkan her şeyi yakıp kül ediyor.{/n}
